questions.text: 1 cup raw spinach + 1 medium banana + 1 cup whole milk — how many calories total?
2 large eggs scrambled in 1 tsp butter — what are the macros (calories, protein, fat, carbs)?
1 cup rolled oats + 1 cup water — calories and protein?
1 medium apple + 2 tbsp peanut butter — calories?
1 slice whole wheat bread + 1 oz cheddar cheese — how many grams of protein?
Half a cup of plain Greek yogurt + 1 tbsp honey — calories and carbs?
1 medium orange + 1 cup skim milk — total calories?
2 tbsp olive oil + 3 oz grilled chicken breast — fat and protein?
1 cup cooked brown rice + 1 tbsp soy sauce — sodium total?
1/2 cup black beans + 1/4 cup salsa — iron content?
1 cup almond milk + 1 medium banana + 1 tbsp almond butter — calories?
2 slices whole wheat toast + 1/4 avocado — calories and fat?
1 cup broccoli florets + 1 tsp olive oil — calories?
3 oz canned tuna + 1 tbsp mayo — protein and fat?
1 cup strawberries + 1 cup plain yogurt — calcium?
2 tbsp butter + 1 cup all-purpose flour — calories?
1 large egg + 1/4 cup shredded mozzarella — protein?
1 medium sweet potato + 1 tsp brown sugar — carbs and calories?
1 cup lentils + 2 cups water (cooked) — fiber and protein?
2 tbsp cream cheese + 1 plain bagel — total calories?
1 cup orange juice + 1 tbsp chia seeds — calories and fiber?
4 oz salmon fillet + 1 tsp lemon juice — protein and fat?
1 cup cottage cheese + 1/2 cup blueberries — protein?
1 medium carrot + 2 tbsp hummus — calories?
1 cup raw oats + 1 tbsp maple syrup + 1 cup 2% milk — total calories?
2 oz cheddar + 6 whole grain crackers — fat and calories?
1 tbsp flaxseed + 1 cup unsweetened almond milk — fiber?
3 oz ground beef (80% lean) + 1 oz American cheese — fat and protein?
1 medium banana + 1 tbsp peanut butter — potassium?
1/2 cup frozen edamame + 1 tsp sesame oil — protein and fat?
1 cup whole milk + 2 tbsp cocoa powder + 1 tsp sugar — calories?
4 oz boneless chicken thigh + 1 tbsp olive oil — calories and fat?
1/2 cup cooked quinoa + 1/4 cup cucumber slices — carbs?
2 tbsp sunflower seeds + 1 medium apple — calories?
1 cup beef broth + 2 oz lean ground beef — sodium?
1 tsp cinnamon + 1 cup oatmeal + 1 tbsp brown sugar — total carbs?
2 large eggs + 1/4 cup bell pepper — calories and vitamin C?
1 cup raspberry + 1 tbsp sugar — carbs?
3 oz shrimp + 1 tsp garlic powder — protein?
1/2 cup canned chickpeas + 1 tbsp tahini — iron? Note: if tahini isn't in FDC as a prepared product, use the best available substitute and disclose it.

Greek salad: 4 cups romaine lettuce, 1/2 cup cucumber slices, 1/4 cup kalamata olives, 3 oz feta cheese, 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes, 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp red wine vinegar — give me macros and sodium.
Overnight oats: 1/2 cup rolled oats, 3/4 cup oat milk, 1 tbsp chia seeds, 1/2 cup blueberries, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tsp honey — total calories, protein, and fiber for 1 serving.
Chicken stir-fry: 5 oz chicken breast, 1 cup broccoli, 1/2 cup snap peas, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 1 cup cooked white rice — total calories, protein, and sodium.
Veggie omelet: 3 large eggs, 1/4 cup diced onion, 1/4 cup diced bell pepper, 1/4 cup mushrooms, 1 oz Swiss cheese, 1 tsp butter — macros breakdown?
Pasta primavera: 2 oz dry pasta, 1 cup mixed vegetables (zucchini, bell pepper, onion), 2 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp parmesan, 2 cloves garlic — calories, carbs, and fat?
Lentil soup: 1 cup dry green lentils, 2 medium carrots, 2 stalks celery, 1 medium onion, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tbsp olive oil, 4 cups vegetable broth — iron and fiber for the whole pot.
Turkey wrap: 1 large flour tortilla, 4 oz sliced turkey breast, 2 tbsp mayo, 1 cup romaine, 1/4 cup shredded carrot, 1 oz provolone — macros and sodium?
Smoothie bowl: 1 cup frozen acai pulp, 1/2 cup frozen mango, 1 medium banana, 1/2 cup coconut milk, toppings: 1 tbsp granola, 1 tbsp coconut flakes — total calories and sugar?
Bean burrito filling: 1 cup pinto beans, 1/2 cup cooked brown rice, 1/4 cup salsa, 1/4 cup shredded cheddar, 2 tbsp sour cream — total calories and iron?
Banana bread batter: 3 medium bananas, 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1/2 cup sugar, 1/4 cup butter, 2 large eggs, 1 tsp baking soda — calories and carbs for the whole loaf?
Quinoa power bowl: 1 cup cooked quinoa, 3 oz grilled salmon, 1/2 cup edamame, 1/2 cup roasted sweet potato, 2 tbsp tahini dressing — give me macros and calcium.
Tuna salad sandwich: 3 oz canned tuna, 2 tbsp mayo, 1 tbsp diced celery, 2 slices whole wheat bread, 2 leaves romaine — protein and sodium?
Chocolate protein shake: 1 cup whole milk, 1 scoop whey protein powder (30g), 1 medium banana, 2 tbsp cocoa powder, 1 tbsp peanut butter, 5 ice cubes — total calories and protein?
Minestrone soup: 1/2 cup kidney beans, 1/2 cup elbow pasta, 1 cup diced tomatoes, 1 medium zucchini, 1 medium carrot, 1/2 cup spinach, 3 cups vegetable broth — fiber and sodium?
Chicken Caesar salad: 4 cups romaine, 4 oz grilled chicken breast, 1 oz parmesan, 1/4 cup croutons, 2 tbsp Caesar dressing — total calories and fat?
Oatmeal raisin cookie dough (makes 24 cookies): 2 cups oats, 1 cup flour, 1/2 cup butter, 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1/2 cup raisins, 2 eggs, 1 tsp vanilla — macros per cookie?
Beef taco filling (serves 4): 1 lb ground beef, 1 packet taco seasoning (28g), 1/2 cup diced onion, 1/4 cup tomato paste — calories per taco?
Spinach and feta frittata (6 portions): 6 large eggs, 1 cup fresh spinach, 2 oz feta, 1/4 cup milk, 1 tbsp olive oil — calories and protein per slice?
Pesto pasta: 3 oz dry spaghetti, 2 tbsp basil pesto, 1 oz pine nuts, 1 oz parmesan, 1 cup cherry tomatoes — calories, fat, and carbs?
Vegetable curry (serves 3): 2 cups coconut milk, 1 cup diced tomatoes, 1 cup chickpeas, 1 medium potato, 1 cup spinach, 2 tbsp curry powder — macros per serving?
Mango lassi: 1 cup mango chunks, 1 cup plain yogurt, 1/2 cup whole milk, 2 tbsp sugar, 1/4 tsp cardamom — calories and sugar?
Shrimp fried rice: 1 cup cooked white rice, 4 oz shrimp, 2 large eggs, 1/2 cup frozen peas, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp vegetable oil, 2 green onions — sodium and protein?
Avocado toast plate: 2 slices sourdough, 1/2 medium avocado, 2 large eggs (poached), 1 tsp red pepper flakes, 1 tsp everything bagel seasoning — total macros?
Chicken noodle soup (serves 6): 8 oz chicken breast, 2 cups egg noodles, 3 medium carrots, 3 stalks celery, 1 medium onion, 6 cups chicken broth — sodium per serving?
Blueberry muffins (makes 12): 2 cups flour, 3/4 cup sugar, 1/2 cup butter, 2 eggs, 3/4 cup milk, 1 cup blueberries, 1 tsp baking powder — calories per muffin?
Black bean tacos (makes 4): 1 cup black beans, 4 small corn tortillas, 1/2 cup corn, 1/4 cup red onion, 1/4 cup cilantro, 1 tbsp lime juice — iron and fiber per taco?
Hummus bowl: 1/2 cup homemade hummus, 1/4 cup cucumber, 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes, 1/4 cup kalamata olives, 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 whole wheat pita — macros and calcium?
Steak salad: 5 oz sirloin steak, 3 cups mixed greens, 1/2 cup cherry tomatoes, 1/4 cup red onion, 2 tbsp balsamic vinaigrette, 1 oz blue cheese — total macros?
Cauliflower fried rice: 2 cups riced cauliflower, 2 large eggs, 1/2 cup frozen peas and carrots, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 2 oz chicken breast — calories and fat?
Strawberry banana smoothie: 1 cup frozen strawberries, 1 medium banana, 3/4 cup Greek yogurt, 1/2 cup orange juice, 1 tbsp honey — total calories and vitamin C?

Chili (serves 8): 1 lb ground turkey, 2 cups kidney beans, 1 can diced tomatoes (14.5 oz), 1 medium onion, 1 medium green bell pepper, 2 tbsp chili powder, 1 cup beef broth — protein and sodium per serving?
Egg salad: 4 large hard-boiled eggs, 3 tbsp mayo, 1 tbsp yellow mustard, 2 stalks celery — fat and calories?
Caprese salad: 2 medium tomatoes, 4 oz fresh mozzarella, 1 tbsp fresh basil, 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp balsamic vinegar — total fat and calcium?
Granola bars (makes 10): 2 cups oats, 1/3 cup honey, 1/4 cup almond butter, 1/4 cup mini chocolate chips, 1/4 cup dried cranberries, 2 tbsp coconut oil — calories and sugar per bar?
Beef and broccoli stir-fry: 6 oz flank steak, 2 cups broccoli, 2 tbsp oyster sauce, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp cornstarch, 1 tsp sesame oil — protein and sodium?
Vegetable frittata (serves 4): 6 eggs, 1/2 cup diced zucchini, 1/2 cup cherry tomatoes, 1/4 cup goat cheese, 1/4 cup baby spinach, 1 tbsp olive oil — calories and fat per serving?
Loaded baked potato soup (serves 4): 3 large russet potatoes, 4 strips bacon, 1 cup shredded cheddar, 1/2 cup sour cream, 3 cups chicken broth, 2 green onions — sodium and fat per bowl?
Poke bowl: 1 cup cooked sushi rice, 4 oz raw ahi tuna, 1/2 avocado, 1/4 cup cucumber, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tsp sesame oil, 1 tbsp sesame seeds — full macro breakdown?
Apple cinnamon oatmeal: 1 cup old-fashioned oats, 1 medium apple (diced), 1 tbsp butter, 1 tsp cinnamon, 1 tbsp brown sugar, 1 cup whole milk — calories and fiber?
Falafel wrap: 4 homemade falafel patties (~30g each), 1 whole wheat pita, 2 tbsp tzatziki, 1/4 cup shredded lettuce, 2 slices tomato, 1/4 cup red onion — total macros?

Tabbouleh: 1 cup cooked bulgur wheat, 2 tbsp sumac (the spice), 1/4 cup fresh parsley, 2 tbsp fresh mint, 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 medium tomato, 1 tbsp lemon juice — macros? Note sumac may not have a direct FDC entry.
1 cup cooked rice — please clarify: is this using the cooked-rice FDC entry or the raw-rice entry scaled to cooked weight? I want the accurate calorie count.
1 cup cooked spinach + 1/2 cup cooked lentils — iron? Use the cooked versions, not raw.
I have a recipe with 2 tbsp za'atar spice blend — what's the best FDC substitute and what are the macros for that amount?
Whole roasted chicken (serves 6): 1 large whole chicken (~3.5 lbs), 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp rosemary, 1 tsp thyme — protein and fat per serving. The recipe uses the whole bird including skin.
Fermented black garlic (2 tbsp) + 1 cup white rice — is black garlic in FDC? If not, substitute regular garlic and disclose. Total macros?
Miso soup: 1 tbsp white miso paste, 2 cups dashi stock, 1/4 cup tofu (soft), 1 tbsp wakame seaweed — sodium. Note: dashi stock may need a substitute if not in FDC.
Smoothie made with 1 cup raw kale vs 1 cup cooked kale — explain which FDC entry you use for each version and what the calorie difference is.
Bread recipe (makes 12 slices): 3 cups bread flour, 1 tbsp active dry yeast, 1 tsp salt, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 cup warm water — note that baking reduces water weight; what are the macros per slice?
1 large head of romaine lettuce (whole head used) — how do you convert 'one head' to grams? Give me total calories, fiber, and iron.
Harissa paste (2 tbsp) + 1 cup cooked couscous — harissa is a blend not in FDC. What ingredient do you substitute and what are the macros?
My recipe calls for 'a handful of pine nuts' (roughly 1 oz) — resolve the vague unit, find the FDC entry, and report fat and calories.
Bone broth (homemade, 2 cups) — this isn't a single FDC ingredient. What's the best substitute (beef broth? chicken broth?) and what's the sodium estimate?
Coconut cream (1/4 cup) vs coconut milk (1/4 cup) — these are different products. I used coconut cream. Make sure to pick the right FDC entry and give me fat and calories.
Trail mix recipe (makes 10 servings): 2 cups mixed nuts, 1 cup dried cranberries, 1 cup dark chocolate chips, 1/2 cup pumpkin seeds, 1/4 cup coconut flakes — calories and fat per serving?
Protein pancakes (makes 8 small pancakes): 1 cup oat flour, 1 scoop vanilla protein powder (35g), 2 eggs, 1/2 cup cottage cheese, 1 tsp baking powder — protein and calories per pancake?
My recipe uses 'amaranth leaves' (2 cups raw) — this is a less common leafy green. What FDC entry do you use or substitute, and what is the iron content?

Loaded nachos (serves 6): 8 oz tortilla chips, 1.5 cups shredded cheddar, 1 cup black beans, 1/2 cup sour cream, 1/4 cup pickled jalapeños, 1/4 cup salsa — give me calories, fat, and sodium per serving. Note: pickled jalapeños may differ from fresh jalapeños in FDC.

Tahini dressing: 3 tbsp tahini, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tbsp water, 1/2 tsp garlic powder — FDC lists sesame seeds and sesame butter; which entry should be used for tahini? Report fat and calories for the full dressing.

Korean bibimbap (serves 2): 1.5 cups cooked short-grain rice, 2 large eggs, 2 cups bean sprouts, 1 cup spinach (cooked), 2 oz ground beef, 2 tbsp gochujang sauce, 1 tsp sesame oil — macros and iron per serving. Note: gochujang may not be in FDC; choose best substitute and disclose.
